name: stellarpredict
description: AMM-based prediction market on Stellar Soroban — Rust contracts (root Cargo workspace) + Node backend + Next.js frontend. The Node projects live in backend/ and frontend/; this root package.json just delegates to them so npm commands work from the repo root.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:web
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run typecheck
